title: The Psychology Behind Lewis Hamilton's Driving — Explained
description:
The Psychology Behind Lewis Hamilton's Driving — Explained

Lewis Hamilton is the most successful driver in Formula 1 history.

More wins. More podiums. More championship battles than almost anyone who has ever raced.

Most people assume his success came from one thing:

👉 raw speed.

But the deeper engineers studied Hamilton's career, the more they realized there was something even more important behind his dominance.

His mind.

In this video, we break down:

- The psychology behind Lewis Ham

title: 2026 F1 Monaco GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: Although Max Verstappen's qualifying brilliance on Sunday came to nought - came to a dead stop on the grid, just after lights-out - there was still a Monaco GP to be run. There were penalties aplenty; there were Safety Cars; there was a standing re-start; and drivers like Ferrari's Charles Leclerc hit the barriers. Through it all, though, from the front, from the pole and with fastest lap to his credit, Kimi Antonelli, 19, the Mercedes driver, won the Monaco GP.  Sir Lewis Hamilton finished a va

title: ANTONELLI SNATCHES POLE! 2026 Monaco F1 QUALIFYING Analysis!
description:
ANTONELLI SNATCHES POLE! 2026 Monaco F1 QUALIFYING Analysis!

KIMI ANTONELLI DOES IT AGAIN.

When it mattered most in Q3, Antonelli found the lap and ripped pole position away from Verstappen by just 0.043s around the streets of Monaco. A circuit where commitment, precision and confidence are everything.

Ferrari looked like favourites after Friday, Verstappen looked threatening throughout qualifying, but when the pressure peaked, it was Antonelli who delivered.

title: 2026 F1 Canadian GP RACE Analysis
description:
2026 F1 Canadian GP RACE Analysis

Canada 2026 delivered absolute heartbreak for George Russell.

Mercedes had the pace, George looked in control, and another huge result was on the table… until the car let go. Mechanical failure ends his race in brutal fashion after what looked like a genuine shot at victory.

But there was another story unfolding before the blow-up: the front tyre battle.

George's early front-right lock-up created a much bigger headache than Antonelli’s initial front-left iss

title: 2026 F1 Canadian GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: What a race!  Kimi Antonelli and George Russell fought for the lead until lap 31, when George's Mercedes ground to a halt with a battery issue. Kimi then cruised to his fourth successive victory, leaving the P2 spotlight on Sir Lewis Hamilton (Ferrari) and Max Verstappen (Red Bull-RBPT-Ford); Sir Lewis won that battle. The McLaren-Mercedes? After qualifying on row two, they were out of it virtually from the start when the team opted to start on Pirelli intermediates on a dry track. Lando Norris

title: 2026 F1 MIAMI GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: Astoundingly - astonishingly - Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli in Miami won his third successive Grand Prix  from his third, successive pole. Peter in this video looks behind that amazing achievement and at the key moments of a momentous race which included: Max Verstappen completing a perfect 360 in front of the field on lap one; a three-way battle for the lead between Ferrari's Charles Leclerc, Kimi and McLaren's Lando Norris; Max re-passing Charles around the outside of a quick left-hander; Charles
